A

AccountCreate - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to create new user accounts on the system.
AccountCreate() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
 
accountCreateLogic(String) - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
Logic that will help in creating a new user in Cataphract
AccountDelete - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to delete user accounts on the system.
AccountDelete(String) - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountDelete
Constructor for AccountDelete class.
AccountModify - Class in Cataphract.API.Dragon
A class to modify user accounts on the system.
AccountModify(String) - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Constructor to store details about the current user to global variables
accountModifyLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountModify
Method to execute account modification logic

A class that provides a set of built in commands for all classes.
Anvil() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Anvil
Sole constructor.
anvilInterpreter(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Anvil
Module implementing the interpreter for common commands.

Method to authenticate user login.

B

Build - Class in Cataphract.API
A class to display the build information and clear the screen.
Build() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Build
 

C

Calendar - Class in Cataphract.API.Astaroth
A class that provides calendar utility for printing calendars.
Calendar() - Constructor for class Cataphract.API.Astaroth.Calendar
 
Cataphract.API - package Cataphract.API
The API package contains all essential programs that helps in the functioning of Cataphract correctly.
Cataphract.API.Astaroth - package Cataphract.API.Astaroth
 
Cataphract.API.Dragon - package Cataphract.API.Dragon
The Dragon packge contains all essential utilities to manage user accounts.
Cataphract.API.Minotaur - package Cataphract.API.Minotaur
The Minotaur package contains tools relating to policy management and cryptography for checking hashes for files and literals.
Cataphract.API.Wraith - package Cataphract.API.Wraith
 
Cataphract.API.Wyvern - package Cataphract.API.Wyvern
 
Cataphract.Core - package Cataphract.Core
The Core package contains the essential kernel files for the kernel to boot and function correctly.
checkPrivilegeLogic() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
Method to check user privileges.
checkUserExistence() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.Login
Method to check if the user account exists.
clearScreen() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.Build
Logic to clear the terminal screen.
confirmReturnToContinue() - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Provide a method that will ask the user to press the RETURN key.
confirmReturnToContinue(String, String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
[ OVERLOAD ] Provide a method that will ask the user to press the RETURN key, with a prefix text and a suffix text.
createDefaultAdministratorAccount() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate

A class implementing cryptographic hashing methods for files and literals

Gets the current date and time formatted according to the specified format.

getTime() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Astaroth.Time
Gets the current time (hours, minutes, and seconds) in the format "HH:mm:ss".
getUnixEpoch() - Method in class Cataphract.API.Astaroth.Time
Gets the current Unix epoch timestamp (seconds since January 1, 1970).

Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Attention tag

Prints the calendar for a specific month and year.
printError(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Error tag
printInfo(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with an Information tag
println(int, int, String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Text that can have a formatted background and foreground color to make a piece of text distinct from the rest.
println(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified.
printWarning(String) - Static method in class Cataphract.API.IOStreams
Prints the text specified, prefixed with a Warning tag

Stores the default Cataphract values in an array.

Retrieves the policy value in a string format, to the program requesting the value

_

_accountNamePolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate

_accountPasswordPolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate

_accountPINPolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate

_accountSecurityKeyPolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
String to display rules for setting the account Security Key
_accountUsernamePolicy - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Dragon.AccountCreate
String to display rules for setting the account usernames
_Branding - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Build
String that holds the branding of the Kernel.
_BuildInfo - Static variable in class Cataphract.API.Build
An array that holds the values for Kernel Name, version, build date, build ID and the kernel branch/build type.
